end end end end end end end V=#w return g(P)end,function(R,N)local g=i(N)local H=function()return V(R,{},N,g)end return H end,{}return(O(8825800-(-883189),{}))(g(P))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[N(-181592+209441)],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
